Off Calendar Jul-08-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This casuse came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Judge: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/M. Vallejo, CSR: David Davenport
Appearances:
Plaintiffs: Forden Athearn and Mary Ann Atheran, in pro per, sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiffs: Forden Athearn and Mary Ann Atheran and against the defendant: Gina Ann Rubattino as follows:
$22,000.00 on the First Cause of Action
$50,000.00 on the Second Cause of Action.
Costs of $ 430.00
For the total of $72,430.00.
Judgment signed in open court.
